config.script:
class CMenuItem private m_pHLI 'final hyperlink private m_strName 'displayed text private m_idPicture 'optional picture private m_idBeforeCtrl 'idctrl "poprzedzającej" to submenu (za nią zaczepiamy subpage) private m_idTopBeforeCtrl 'before-ctrl toplevel menu (dziedziczona we wszystkich itemach) private m_strTip 'tool tip
private m_oArrSubItems
private sub class_initialize() set m_oArrSubItems = nothing set m_pHLI = nothing m_idPicture = 0 m_strName = "" m_idBeforeCtrl = 0 m_idTopBeforeCtrl = 0 m_strTip = "" end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_oArrSubItems = nothing end sub
public function has_subitems() has_subitems = not (m_oArrSubItems is nothing) end function
public function addnew_subitem(byval pParentMenuItem) if m_oArrSubItems is nothing then set m_oArrSubItems = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() end if dim pNewSubItem : set pNewSubItem = new CMenuItem pNewSubItem.toprelatedctrl = pParentMenuItem.toprelatedctrl m_oArrSubItems.Add pNewSubItem set addnew_subitem = pNewSubItem end function
public function get_subitem(byval nIndex) set get_subitem = nothing if has_subitems() then if nIndex < m_oArrSubItems.Count() then set get_subitem = m_oArrSubItems.Value(nIndex) end if end if end function
public property get hli set hli = m_pHLI end property public property get name name = m_strName end property public property get idpic idpic = m_idPicture end property public property get relatedctrl relatedctrl = m_idBeforeCtrl end property public property get tip tip = m_strTip end property public property get toprelatedctrl toprelatedctrl = m_idTopBeforeCtrl end property
public property set hli(byref pHLI) set m_pHLI = pHLI end property public property let name(byref strName) m_strName = strName end property public property let idpic(byval idPicture) m_idPicture = idPicture end property public property let relatedctrl(byval idCtrl) m_idBeforeCtrl = idCtrl end property public property let toprelatedctrl(byval idCtrl) m_idTopBeforeCtrl = idCtrl end property public property let tip(byref strTip) m_strTip = strTip end property
'---------- application interface ------ public sub add_item(byref strName,byref pHLI) add_item_pic strName,pHLI,0 end sub
public sub add_item_pic(byref strName,byref pHLI,byval idPicture) dim pNewSubItem : set pNewSubItem = addnew_subitem(Me) if (isObject(pHLI)) then set pNewSubItem.hli = pHLI else set pNewSubItem.hli = doc_.createhlistr(pHLI) end if pNewSubItem.name = strName pNewSubItem.idpic = idPicture end sub
public function add_submenu(byref strName) dim pNewSubItem : set pNewSubItem = addnew_subitem(Me) pNewSubItem.name = strName set add_submenu = pNewSubItem end function end class
function new_menu(byval strName,byval idRelatedCtrl) dim pMenuItem : set pMenuItem = new CMenuItem pMenuItem.relatedctrl = idRelatedCtrl pMenuItem.toprelatedctrl = idRelatedCtrl pMenuItem.name = strName set new_menu = pMenuItem end function
sub render_menu(byref pDestPage,byref pMenuItem) dim pContainerCtrl : set pContainerCtrl = pDestPage.ctrl(pMenuItem.relatedctrl).parent '--- create subpage dim pSubPage : set pSubPage = pContainerCtrl.insertnew(CTRL_TYPE_PAGEMAN,pMenuItem.relatedctrl,-1) with pSubPage .width = MINIMIZE_SIZE .title = pMenuItem.name
'--- override close picture (menu_kill_popup resides in LIB) set .widgets.closepicture.hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='mm_kill_popup'") .widgets.closepicture.hli.prop(1) = pSubPage.ident end with '--- create hosting table dim pTable : set pTable = pSubPage.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) dim oTB : set oTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(pDestPage).attach(pTable)
if pMenuItem.has_subitems() then dim iter : iter = 0 dim pSubMenuItem : set pSubMenuItem = pMenuItem.get_subitem(iter) do while (not pSubMenuItem is nothing) oTB.newrow.row.styleitem = STYLE_MENUTITLE with oTB.newcell.cell .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .width = 400
if pSubMenuItem.idpic <> 0 then oTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE,-1).element.image = pSubMenuItem.idpic end if end with with oTB.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).element .text = " " + pSubMenuItem.name + " " if not pSubMenuItem.hli is nothing then set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "mm_fire_cmd" '--- propertiary protocol --- .hli.prop(1) = pSubPage.ident set .hli.prop(2) = pSubMenuItem else if pSubMenuItem.has_subitems() then set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "mm_open_sub_menu" '--- propertiary protocol --- .hli.prop(1) = pSubPage.ident set .hli.prop(2) = pSubMenuItem end if end if pSubMenuItem.relatedctrl = .ident end with
iter = iter + 1 set pSubMenuItem = pMenuItem.get_subitem(iter) loop end if end sub
sub on_mm_fire_cmd(byref pHLI) '--- propertiary protocol --- doc_.postcommand pHLI.prop(2).hli.getstring() end sub
sub on_mm_kill_popup(byref pPage,byref pHLI) '--- propertiary protocol --- pPage.ctrl(pHLI.prop(1)).parent.remove pHLI.prop(1) end sub
sub on_mm_kill_popup_recursive(byref pPage,byref pHLI) '-- for now only 1 level dim idTopRelCtrl : idTopRelCtrl = pHLI.prop(2).toprelatedctrl dim pRelatedCtrl : set pRelatedCtrl = pPage.ctrl(idTopRelCtrl).nextelement if not pRelatedCtrl is nothing then if pRelatedCtrl.type = CTRL_TYPE_PAGEMAN then pRelatedCtrl.parent.remove pRelatedCtrl exit sub end if end if end sub
sub on_mm_show_hide(byref pPage,byref pMenu) dim pRelatedCtrl : set pRelatedCtrl = pPage.ctrl(pMenu.relatedctrl).nextelement if not pRelatedCtrl is nothing then if pRelatedCtrl.type = CTRL_TYPE_PAGEMAN then pRelatedCtrl.parent.remove pRelatedCtrl exit sub end if end if render_menu pPage,pMenu end sub
